full_text:
Yang Yong (Zizhao) 楊顒 (子昭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Yong (楊顒), styledZizhao (子昭). Rebuked Zhuge Liang for overseeing every aspect of the administration personally. Yang Yong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Yang Yong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
